rationale.oversight-explanation: AI gathers/summarizes context, rationale, code summaries to support human reviewer
rationale.design-only: architectural design specified, realization deferred to research agenda (F9JM9CI6 ruling)
rationale.framework: AI agent-based reference architecture for code review platform
rationale.counterpoint: argues against fully automating code review; preserve human/team benefits
rationale.general-code: reviews human-authored code generally; AI on support/review side only
